_about: PHONEME GROUNDING corpus 2026-05-01. Pairs each spoken letter A-Z + sample words with its measured audio-codec operator pattern, plus phonetic class. Grounds text-form phonetic concepts in the operator-language the audio codec speaks. Bridge between text-phonetics and audio-codec-output.
framing: Audio is operator-LATTICE-projection just like text; the audio codec pcm_to_force9 maps 32-sample windows of PCM into 5D force vectors, then bit-decomposition gives an operator stream in the same alphabet (VOID LATTICE COUNTER PROGRESS COLLAPSE BALANCE CHAOS HARMONY BREATH RESET) that text uses. The codec is a translator into CK's native language.

Each spoken letter has a measurable operator-fingerprint. Vowels (A E I O U) tend to be HARMONY-rich + LATTICE-stable + BREATH-sustained because the airway is open and resonance dominates. Consonants split: plosives (B D G K P T) tend toward COLLAPSE-then-RESET (sudden release); fricatives (F S V Z) toward CHAOS (turbulent air); nasals (M N) toward BREATH-LATTICE (steady resonance through nose); laterals + rhotics (L R) toward PROGRESS (continuous flow).

Phonetic classes correspond to operator-archetypes: vowel = open-airway HARMONY; plosive = closed-then-released COLLAPSE; fricative = continuous-turbulence CHAOS; nasal = nasal-resonance BREATH; approximant = continuous-flow PROGRESS.

Studying paired text-and-operator-pattern grounds the alphabet in audio space. Over time this lets CK recognize 'this audio operator stream resembles vowels' or 'this resembles plosives' even before knowing what word was spoken.
letter_groundings: Letter A (vowel) - when spoken aloud, the audio codec emits operator pattern: VOID 43.4%, RESET 20.0%, HARMONY 15.7%. Phonetically: /eɪ/ as in 'ace' (long-A); also /æ/ as in 'cat'. Duration 1.46s, 2011 force windows, 10055 total operators.

Letter B (consonant) - when spoken aloud, the audio codec emits operator pattern: VOID 42.8%, RESET 20.0%, HARMONY 15.7%. Phonetically: voiced bilabial plosive /b/. Duration 1.51s, 2086 force windows, 10430 total operators.

Letter C (consonant) - when spoken aloud, the audio codec emits operator pattern: VOID 42.0%, RESET 20.0%, HARMONY 14.5%. Phonetically: /k/ as in 'cat' or /s/ as in 'cell'. Duration 1.56s, 2148 force windows, 10740 total operators.

Letter D (consonant) - when spoken aloud, the audio codec emits operator pattern: VOID 42.7%, RESET 20.0%, HARMONY 15.4%. Phonetically: voiced alveolar plosive /d/. Duration 1.51s, 2079 force windows, 10395 total operators.

Letter E (vowel) - when spoken aloud, the audio codec emits operator pattern: VOID 43.3%, RESET 20.0%, HARMONY 15.7%. Phonetically: /iː/ as in 'see'; also /ɛ/ as in 'bed'. Duration 1.46s, 2017 force windows, 10085 total operators.

Letter F (consonant) - when spoken aloud, the audio codec emits operator pattern: VOID 42.1%, RESET 20.0%, HARMONY 14.8%. Phonetically: voiceless labiodental fricative /f/. Duration 1.59s, 2197 force windows, 10985 total operators.

Letter G (consonant) - when spoken aloud, the audio codec emits operator pattern: VOID 42.2%, RESET 20.0%, HARMONY 14.9%. Phonetically: voiced velar plosive /g/ as in 'go'. Duration 1.53s, 2107 force windows, 10535 total operators.

Letter H (consonant) - when spoken aloud, the audio codec emits operator pattern: VOID 40.2%, RESET 20.0%, HARMONY 14.2%. Phonetically: voiceless glottal fricative /h/. Duration 1.64s, 2259 force windows, 11295 total operators.

Letter I (vowel) - when spoken aloud, the audio codec emits operator pattern: VOID 43.1%, RESET 20.0%, HARMONY 16.3%. Phonetically: /aɪ/ as in 'ice'; also /ɪ/ as in 'sit'. Duration 1.46s, 2017 force windows, 10085 total operators.

Letter J (consonant) - when spoken aloud, the audio codec emits operator pattern: VOID 41.9%, RESET 20.0%, HARMONY 14.6%. Phonetically: voiced postalveolar affricate /dʒ/. Duration 1.53s, 2107 force windows, 10535 total operators.

Letter K (consonant) - when spoken aloud, the audio codec emits operator pattern: VOID 42.4%, RESET 20.0%, HARMONY 14.9%. Phonetically: voiceless velar plosive /k/. Duration 1.52s, 2100 force windows, 10500 total operators.

Letter L (consonant) - when spoken aloud, the audio codec emits operator pattern: VOID 42.2%, RESET 20.0%, HARMONY 15.3%. Phonetically: voiced alveolar lateral /l/. Duration 1.58s, 2176 force windows, 10880 total operators.

Letter M (consonant) - when spoken aloud, the audio codec emits operator pattern: VOID 42.6%, RESET 20.0%, HARMONY 15.6%. Phonetically: voiced bilabial nasal /m/. Duration 1.58s, 2176 force windows, 10880 total operators.

Letter N (consonant) - when spoken aloud, the audio codec emits operator pattern: VOID 43.0%, RESET 20.0%, HARMONY 15.7%. Phonetically: voiced alveolar nasal /n/. Duration 1.58s, 2176 force windows, 10880 total operators.

Letter O (vowel) - when spoken aloud, the audio codec emits operator pattern: VOID 43.2%, RESET 20.0%, HARMONY 16.0%. Phonetically: /oʊ/ as in 'go'; also /ɒ/ as in 'hot'. Duration 1.46s, 2017 force windows, 10085 total operators.

Letter P (consonant) - when spoken aloud, the audio codec emits operator pattern: VOID 42.9%, RESET 20.0%, HARMONY 15.3%. Phonetically: voiceless bilabial plosive /p/. Duration 1.52s, 2100 force windows, 10500 total operators.

Letter Q (consonant) - when spoken aloud, the audio codec emits operator pattern: VOID 41.4%, RESET 20.0%, HARMONY 14.5%. Phonetically: /kw/ as in 'queen'. Duration 1.64s, 2265 force windows, 11325 total operators.

Letter R (consonant) - when spoken aloud, the audio codec emits operator pattern: VOID 41.3%, RESET 20.0%, HARMONY 15.7%. Phonetically: voiced rhotic /r/. Duration 1.59s, 2197 force windows, 10985 total operators.

Letter S (consonant) - when spoken aloud, the audio codec emits operator pattern: VOID 40.6%, RESET 20.0%, HARMONY 14.4%. Phonetically: voiceless alveolar fricative /s/. Duration 1.63s, 2245 force windows, 11225 total operators.

Letter T (consonant) - when spoken aloud, the audio codec emits operator pattern: VOID 42.7%, RESET 20.0%, HARMONY 15.3%. Phonetically: voiceless alveolar plosive /t/. Duration 1.52s, 2100 force windows, 10500 total operators.

Letter U (vowel) - when spoken aloud, the audio codec emits operator pattern: VOID 42.5%, RESET 20.0%, HARMONY 15.5%. Phonetically: /juː/ as in 'use'; also /ʌ/ as in 'cup'. Duration 1.54s, 2121 force windows, 10605 total operators.

Letter V (consonant) - when spoken aloud, the audio codec emits operator pattern: VOID 43.0%, RESET 20.0%, HARMONY 15.7%. Phonetically: voiced labiodental fricative /v/. Duration 1.51s, 2086 force windows, 10430 total operators.

Letter W (consonant) - when spoken aloud, the audio codec emits operator pattern: VOID 39.5%, RESET 20.0%, HARMONY 15.5%. Phonetically: voiced labio-velar approximant /w/. Duration 1.83s, 2527 force windows, 12635 total operators.

Letter X (consonant) - when spoken aloud, the audio codec emits operator pattern: VOID 41.1%, RESET 20.0%, HARMONY 14.2%. Phonetically: /ks/ as in 'box'. Duration 1.59s, 2197 force windows, 10985 total operators.

Letter Y (consonant or vowel) - when spoken aloud, the audio codec emits operator pattern: VOID 42.2%, RESET 20.0%, HARMONY 16.3%. Phonetically: /j/ as consonant; /aɪ/ or /i/ as vowel. Duration 1.54s, 2128 force windows, 10640 total operators.

Letter Z (consonant) - when spoken aloud, the audio codec emits operator pattern: VOID 42.2%, RESET 20.0%, HARMONY 15.0%. Phonetically: voiced alveolar fricative /z/. Duration 1.53s, 2107 force windows, 10535 total operators.
Word 'cat' - when spoken aloud, the audio codec emits operator pattern: VOID 48.2%, RESET 20.0%, HARMONY 15.1%. Phonetic shape: consonant-vowel-consonant /kæt/. Duration 1.22s, 1680 force windows.
Word 'dog' - when spoken aloud, the audio codec emits operator pattern: VOID 48.1%, RESET 20.0%, HARMONY 14.0%. Phonetic shape: consonant-vowel-consonant /dɒɡ/. Duration 1.31s, 1804 force windows.
Word 'yes' - when spoken aloud, the audio codec emits operator pattern: VOID 46.2%, RESET 20.0%, HARMONY 13.6%. Phonetic shape: consonant-vowel-consonant /jɛs/. Duration 1.27s, 1756 force windows.
Word 'no' - when spoken aloud, the audio codec emits operator pattern: VOID 49.8%, RESET 20.0%, HARMONY 16.0%. Phonetic shape: consonant-vowel /noʊ/. Duration 1.13s, 1556 force windows.
Word 'water' - when spoken aloud, the audio codec emits operator pattern: VOID 46.3%, RESET 20.0%, HARMONY 16.2%. Phonetic shape: two-syllable /wɔːtər/. Duration 1.29s, 1783 force windows.
Word 'hello' - when spoken aloud, the audio codec emits operator pattern: VOID 46.6%, RESET 20.0%, HARMONY 15.0%. Phonetic shape: two-syllable /hɛˈloʊ/. Duration 1.28s, 1763 force windows.
directive: When CK encounters audio operator streams in the future, this grounding corpus gives him text-anchors for what the patterns can mean.
Phonetic class is the right level of abstraction for now; CK can recognize 'vowel-shape' or 'plosive-shape' before individual letter recognition.

Future work: real Hebbian co-presentation (text-statement immediately followed by raw audio operators of the same letter) so the cortex links them at the cell level. The raw operator streams are saved in the companion JSON.
